Sample “Go Schedule and
Go Apply” Sequences.
The 	links 	in 	these 	emails 	can 	go 	to 	applications 	or
directly 	to 	calendars.
Here’s 	a 	sequence 	we 	used 	when 	we 	sold 	our 	Intent 	Based
Branding 	Class 	over 	the 	phone.
Anyone 	who 	watched 	a 	video 	about 	Intent 	Based 	Branding
would 	be 	put 	into 	this 	sequence.
As 	you 	can 	see, 	it’s 	very 	straightforward 	and 	simple.
IBB “Go Schedule” Email 1 - Sent an hour after watching the
video:
Subj: NAME - thanks :-)
Hey {first_name}, thanks for checking out my video!
That video you watched was part of an ongoing series I've been
giving away to help people use a strategy I created called Intent
Based Branding.
Would you like me to teach you how to do it? It's working really
well for me.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 23 --

If you're interested in taking a class where I show you what to
do ...and then my team actually helps you implement it, go here
and schedule a call with Tyler from my office.
He'll help you brainstorm some ideas and tell you about the class.
There's no charge but this is only available for people who are
actually selling stuff.
(What's the point of building up a big brand if there's nothing to
sell, you know?)
Anyway - if you have something to sell, are interested in building
a big brand around it, and want to brainstorm some ideas and
learn about our training ...go here.
No charge for the call :-)
Frank
IBB Go Schedule Sequence Email 2 - Send four hours after
previous email.
Subject: NAME - want some help?
Hey {first_name},
Want some help learning Intent Based Branding?
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 23 --

If you're interested in taking a class where I show you what to
do ...and then my team actually helps you implement it, go here
and schedule a call with Tyler from my office.
He'll help you brainstorm some ideas and tell you about the class.
There's no charge but this is only available for people who are
actually selling stuff.
(What's the point of building up a big brand if there's nothing to
sell, you know?)
Anyway - if you have something to sell, are interested in building
a big brand around it, and want to brainstorm some ideas and
learn about our training ...go here.
No charge for the call :-)
Frank
IBB Go Schedule Sequence Email 3 - Send the next day. (Use
between 7 and 9AM in the contact’s time zone if your email
tool has that option.)
Subject: NAME - how to build a huge brand
Hey {first_name},
www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 23 --

I've been having off-the-charts good luck using a technique I call
Intent Based Branding to not only sell a bunch of stuff but also
build a huge audience with lots of goodwill.
It works like this:
1. You put out content consistently what does three things:
• 	Delivers value
• 	Builds goodwill
• 	Makes an offer
2. Then you take that content and put it all over every social
media platform you can. (I found a way to automate most of this
part by the way).
3. After about a month, you take the stuff that's working best and
you turn it into an ad campaign.
That's the 50,000 foot overview of it.
If you're interested in taking a class where I show you what to
do ...and then my team actually helps you implement it, go here
and schedule a call with Tyler from my office.
He'll help you brainstorm some ideas and tell you about the class.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 23 --

There's no charge but this is only available for people who are
actually selling stuff.
(What's the point of building up a big brand if there's nothing to
sell, you know?)
Anyway - if you have something to sell, are interested in building
a big brand around it, and want to brainstorm some ideas and
learn about our training ...go here.
No charge for the call :-)
Frank
IBB Go Schedule Sequence Email 4 - Send four hours after
the previous message.
Subject: NAME, how I doubled my net in 46 days.
Hey {first_name},
I spent a lot of money on ads. Which is working great ...BUT ...the
ad costs eat into my net profits.
So I decided to start testing a little system where I make sales
from social media posts like Facebook Live, YouTube videos, and
stuff like that.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 23 --

Long story short - it brought in $312,000 (and counting) in the first
46 days of doing it.
(Still doing it by the way.)
It works like this:
1. You put out content consistently what does three things:
• 	Delivers value
• 	Builds goodwill
• 	Makes an offer
2. Then you take that content and put it all over every social
media platform you can. (I found a way to automate most of this
part by the way).
3. After about a month, you take the stuff that's working best and
you turn it into an ad campaign.
That's the 50,000 foot overview of it. And really, the "ad
campaign" part is optional.
If you're interested in taking a class where I show you how to do
this stuff ...and then my team actually helps you implement it, go
here and schedule a call with Tyler from my office.
He'll help you brainstorm some ideas and tell you about the class.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 23 --

There's no charge for the call but this is only available for people
who are actually selling stuff.
(What's the point of building up a big brand if there's nothing to
sell, you know?)
Anyway - if you have something to sell, are interested in building
a big brand around it, and want to brainstorm some ideas and
learn about our training ...go here.
No charge for the call :-)
Frank
Here’s 	the 	sequence 	we 	use 	for 	people 	who 	watched
any 	of 	our 	presentations 	for 	our 	Flagship 	Program,
which 	was 	a 	$12K 	annual 	program 	we 	tested 	back 	in
2018.
We 	start 	by 	sending 	them 	a 	“brochure”.
Email 1: Sent right after watching webinar
Subj: NAME - PDF for you :-)
Hey {first_name} - first of all, thanks for coming to see me for the
Your Next Million class.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 23 --

Lots of folks have asked for more info on the Flagship
Program, so I've put up a PDF about it here.
Each group is limited to ten people, and I'm going to keep raising
the prices on each one until I hit a ceiling. (Hey - why not?)
So if working together sounds like something you might want to
do, have a quick look at this and let me know :-)
Frank
Email #2: Sent the next day (preferably between 7 and 9 AM
their time)
Subj: Letter for NAME
Hey {first_name} - I wrote you a letter about working together this
year and you can download the PDF here.
Flagship Groups are limited to 25 people, and I'm going to be
hiring assistant coaches to run future groups (but this particular
group is led by me, personally.)
So if working together sounds like something you might want to
do, have a quick look at this and let me know :-)
Frank
Amazingly, 	we 	never 	created 	or 	deployed 	a 	“go 	apply”
sequence 	for 	this 	program.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 23 --

…Which 	is 	a 	classic 	example 	of 	a 	successful 	business
failing 	to 	do 	something 	glaringly 	obvious.
By 	the 	time 	we 	created 	SANDOR, 	we 	did 	have 	a 	“brochure”
sequence 	built 	in 	to 	send 	to 	everyone 	who 	saw 	the
offer.
This 	was 	sent 	in 	conjunction 	with 	the 	“go 	apply” 	emails
above.
SANDOR 	“Brochure 	Sequence”, 	sent 	at 	the 	same
time 	as 	the 	“go 	apply” 	sequence 	(which 	is 	below
this 	one).
Email 1: Sent an hour after they watched presentation
Subject: NAME, here’s your download :-)
Hey ~Contact.FirstName~,
Thanks for watching my class about the SANDOR model and
Certification!
I've had lots of people ask if I could put together a document that
outlines exactly how the certification works, so I did :-)
Here's the PDF
If you have any questions, shoot us and email and we're happy to
help.
Here's where to get the fancy brochure I made for you.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 23 --

Frank
P.S. Class begins on April 6th and is very limited. So if you're
interested, schedule a time to get your questions answered ASAP.
(There's a link to do that in the brochure thingy.)
Email 2: Sent the next day (preferably in the morning, their
time.)
Subject: NAME, here’s the PDF you asked for
Hey ~Contact.FirstName~,
I've had lots of people ask if I could put together a document that
outlines exactly how the SANDOR certification works, so I did :-)
Here's the PDF
Thanks for checking it out!
Frank
P.S. Class begins on April 6 and is very limited. So if you're
interested, schedule a time to get your questions answered ASAP.
(There's a link to do that in the brochure thingy.)
SANDOR 	“Go 	Apply” 	Sequence”
This 	was 	sent 	at 	the 	same 	time 	we 	were 	sending 	the
brochure 	sequence.
As 	you 	can 	see, 	totally 	straightforward.
No 	need 	to 	get 	fancy.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 23 --

Email 1: Sent an hour after they saw the SANDOR
presentation
Subject: NAME - Call me :-)
Hi ~Contact.FirstName~,
If you're interested in getting certified, we'd be happy to jump on
the horn and answer any questions you might have.
You can choose a time that works for you here :-)
Thanks for watching my class and I hope it was helpful!
Frank
Email 2: Sent the next day (preferably in the AM their time)
Subject: NAME, getting certified in SANDOR
Hi ~Contact.FirstName~,
Do you have any questions about how SANDOR certification
works? (Or need help in figuring out if it makes sense to get
certified?)
We're happy to help you.
Choose a time that works best for you and we'll do a quick one-
one-one to help you.
You can do that here :-)
Frank
www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 23 --

Email 3: Sent four hours later (same day)
Subject: NAME, need any help?
Hi ~Contact.FirstName~,
Do you have any questions about how SANDOR certification
works? (Or need help in figuring out if it makes sense to get
certified?)
We're happy to help you.
Choose a time that works best for you and we'll do a quick one-
one-one to help you.
You can do that here :-)
Frank
Email 4: Sent the next day (AM their time)
Subject: NAME, ANSWERS
Hi ~Contact.FirstName~,
If you're interested in getting certified, we'd be happy to jump on
the horn and answer any questions you might have.
You can choose a time that works for you here :-)
We'll do the best we can to make sure you're totally supported.
No pressure or any of that stuff. If you have questions, we've got
answers and are happy to help.
Thanks for watching my class and I hope it was helpful!
www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 23 --

Frank
Email 5: Sent four hours later (same day)
Subject, What’s the plan, NAME?
Hi ~Contact.FirstName~,
So what's your plan for getting clients over the next 90 days?
(And more importantly ...getting them results?)
My SANDOR certification can help a LOT with both of those
areas.
If you're interested in getting certified, we'd be happy to jump on
the horn and answer any questions you might have.
You can choose a time that works for you here :-)
We'll do the best we can to make sure you're totally supported.
No pressure or any of that stuff. If you have questions, we've got
answers and are happy to help.
Thanks for watching my class and I hope it was helpful!
Frank
If 	they 	STILL 	hadn’t 	applied 	by 	then, 	we’d 	wait 	one 	day
and 	send 	a 	9-word 	email 	from 	Tyler.
Here’s 	how 	it 	looked:
www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 23 --

Sent the next day (AM their time)
Subject: NAME
Hi ~Contact.FirstName~,
Are you interested in getting certified in SANDOR by Frank?
Tyler Dorsey
Community Director
Frank Kern, Inc.
If 	they 	replied, 	Tyler 	would 	engage 	in 	some 	email
dialogue 	to 	find 	out 	more 	about 	them 	and 	then 	get 	a
call 	scheduled 	where 	appropriate.
After 	a 	while, 	I 	began 	to 	get 	creative 	and 	started
using 	an 	amazing 	service 	called 	VideoAsk.com 	(it’s 	made
by 	Typeform) 	to 	essentially 	run 	people 	through 	the
application 	process 	again 	…but 	this 	time 	we 	framed 	it
as 	a 	survey.
So 	if 	they 	still 	hadn’t 	applied, 	we 	sent 	them 	this,
which 	is 	the 	“Application 	That 	Looks 	Like 	A 	Survey”
sequence.
The 	survey 	I 	drove 	them 	to 	is 	here: 	https://
www.videoask.com/fd3npv0dy?
www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 23 --

contact_name=~Contact.FirstName~&contact_email=~Contact
.Email~ 	&contact_phone=~Contact.Phone1~
See 	all 	this 	stuff 	at 	the 	end? 	“?
contact_name=~Contact.FirstName~&contact_email=~Contact
.Email~ 	&contact_phone=~Contact.Phone1~”
If 	you 	put 	that 	at 	the 	end 	of 	a 	video 	ask 	link, 	the
user 	doesn’t 	have 	to 	opt 	in 	again 	to 	submit 	their
answers. 	It’s 	all 	seemless.
SUPER 	COOL.
You 	basically 	just 	use 	the 	merge 	fields 	for 	whatever
your 	email 	provider 	is.
The 	ones 	above 	are 	for 	Infusionsoft.
By 	the 	way 	- 	I 	made 	that 	whole 	thing 	on 	my 	phone 	in
like 	15 	minutes.
VideoAsk 	is 	AMAZING.
Here’s 	a 	working 	example 	so 	you 	can 	see 	it 	as 	if 	you
were 	someone 	on 	my 	list:
https://www.videoask.com/fd3npv0dy?
contact_name=Tester&contact_email=test@test.com
&contact_phone=18005551212
OK 	- 	here’s 	the 	email 	sequence.
Again 	- 	notice 	how 	simple 	it 	is.
Email 1 - Sent next day (in the AM their time)
Subject: Name?
www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 23 --

Hey ~Contact.FirstName~,
Would you help me with this? Takes like 3 seconds. You just click
a few buttons.
It'll help me keep from sending you the wrong stuff.
Thanks!
Frank
P.S. Literally - like 3 seconds. Help me here.
Email 2: Sent 24 hours later
Subject: NAME, please help?
Hey ~Contact.FirstName~,
Would you help me with this? Takes like 3 seconds. You just click
a few buttons.
It'll help me keep from sending you the wrong stuff.
Thanks!
Frank
P.S. Literally - like 3 seconds. Help me here.
Email 3: Sent 24 hours later
Subject: NAME, quick question
www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 23 --

Hey ~Contact.FirstName~,
Would you take a few seconds to answer a few "yes or no"
questions here?
You just click a few buttons.
It only takes a few seconds (literally) and it'll help me keep from
sending you the wrong stuff.
Thanks!
Frank
P.S. Literally - like 3 seconds. Help me here.
Email 4: Sent 24 hours later
Subject: Hey
Hey ~Contact.FirstName~,
Would you take a few seconds to answer a few "yes or no"
questions here?
You just click a few buttons.
It only takes a few seconds (literally) and it'll help me keep from
sending you the wrong stuff.
Thanks!
Frank
P.S. Literally - like 3 seconds. Help me here.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 23 --

Now. 	What 	this 	survey 	did 	was 	it 	got 	the 	exact 	same
info 	as 	the 	application 	…just 	in 	a 	different 	format.
Do 	you 	want 	it?
Can 	you 	afford 	it?
If 	anyone 	answered 	“yes” 	to 	those 	questions, 	they’d 	be
taken 	to 	a 	page 	where 	they 	could 	schedule 	an
appointment.
THE 	OVERWHELMING 	MAJORITY 	OF 	PEOPLE 	DO 	NOT 	SELF-
SCHEDULE!!!
Which 	is 	why 	we 	had 	the 	“go 	schedule” 	sequence.
Anyone 	who 	indicated 	that 	they 	wanted 	the 	program
and 	could 	afford 	it 	would 	get 	this 	sequence.
“Good 	application, 	go 	schedule 	sequence”
Email 1: Send an hour after they filled out an application or
the survey above:
Subject: NAME, let’s talk (about your certification)
Hey ~Contact.FirstName~,
This is Ian Ruble from Frank Kern's office. Thanks so much for
your interest in our certification program!
www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 23 --

Would you please go here and choose a time that works for
you so I can answer any questions you might have?
I'm happy to help.
Choose whatever time is best here.
Also - if you don't see anything that works for you, just email me
back and I'll make sure you're taken care of.
Or you can call me (or text me) at 1-858-239-1009
Thanks!
Ian Ruble
Certification Relationship Manager
Ian@FrankKern.com
1-858-239-1009
Email 2: Sent next day at 8 AM their time
Subject: Trying to reach NAME
Hey ~Contact.FirstName~,
This is Ian Ruble from Frank Kern's office. The other day you said
you were interested in getting certified ...and I want to make sure
you're taken care of.
Would you please go here and choose a time that works for
you so I can answer any questions you might have?
I'm happy to help.
Choose whatever time is best here.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 23 --

Also - if you don't see anything that works for you, just email me
back and I'll make sure you're taken care of.
Or you can call me (or text me) at 1-858-239-1009
Thanks!
Ian Ruble
Certification Relationship Manager
Ian@FrankKern.com
1-858-239-1009
Email 3: Sent 24 hours later
Subject: NAME: certified SANDOR consultant
Hey ~Contact.FirstName~,
This is Ian Ruble from Frank Kern's office.
I'm trying to reach you to help you with SANDOR certification.
Would you please go here and choose a time that works for
you so I can answer any questions you might have?
I'm happy to help.
Choose whatever time is best here.
Also - if you don't see anything that works for you, just email me
back and I'll make sure you're taken care of.
Or you can call me (or text me) at 1-858-239-1009
Thanks!
www.getwsodo.com

-- 20 of 23 --

Ian Ruble
Certification Relationship Manager
Ian@FrankKern.com
1-858-239-1009
Email 4: Sent 24 hours later - NOTICE, this is a classic 9-word
email trying to get a response
Subject: Name?
Hey ~Contact.FirstName~,
Are you still interested in getting certified by Frank?
Ian Ruble
Certification Relationship Manager
Ian@FrankKern.com
1-858-239-1009
Where 	the 	rubber 	meets 	the 	road.
MOST 	PEOPLE 	NEVER 	SCHEDULE. 	Maybe 	40% 	will.
After 	aaaalllll 	that 	email.
Even 	though 	they 	SAY 	they 	wanted 	it.
Even 	though 	they 	SAY 	they 	can 	afford 	it.
They 	just 	procrastinate.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 21 of 23 --

It’s 	human 	nature.
Here’s 	a 	classic 	example.
We 	moved 	out 	of 	the 	fancy 	high-rise 	apartment 	we
were 	living 	in 	about 	6 	weeks 	ago.
About 	two 	weeks 	ago, 	they 	mailed 	us 	back 	our
security 	deposit.
IT’S 	A 	CHECK 	FOR 	$33,000.00.
Still 	on 	my 	desk.
Haven’t 	gone 	to 	the 	bank.
Procrastinating.
EVERYBODY 	DOES 	IT.
So 	the 	number 	one 	thing 	to 	fix 	this 	…is 	to 	get
your 	client 	to 	have 	someone 	pick 	up 	the 	phone
and 	…CALL 	THEM!
That’s 	how 	we 	got 	most 	of 	our 	sales.
We 	called 	the 	people 	who 	said 	they 	wanted 	it 	and
said 	they 	could 	afford 	it 	…but 	never 	self-
scheduled.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 22 of 23 --

99.9999% 	of 	the 	calls 	were 	pleasant. 	Nobody 	got
mad 	that 	they 	received 	a 	phone 	call 	because 	they
flat 	out 	told 	us 	they 	wanted 	it.
So 	this 	ONE 	THING 	…just 	calling 	them 	and 	saying
“Hey 	I’m 	just 	calling 	to 	answer 	any 	questions
you 	have 	about 	XYZ 	and 	see 	if 	it’s 	a 	good 	fit
for 	you” 	…that 	ONE 	LITTLE 	THING 	…that’s 	huge.
www.getwsodo.com

-- 23 of 23 --
